---
title: "Calculate Indicators"
output: # html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# R Set-up

```{r}
# Clear workspace
rm(list = ls())

# Libraries 
library(terra)
library(here)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(aws.s3)

# Authenticate aws
source(here::here('aws_cred.R'))

# Base S3 location (GDAL-style path)
s3_base <- "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data"

dat.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "raw")
roi.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "studyarea")
dum.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "dummy")
ind.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "indicators")

```

# Data

## 0.1 Indicator Data
```{r}
# Find matching GeoPackage files
objs <- get_bucket(
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  prefix = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data/indicators/"
)

gpkg_files <- paste0(
  "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/",
  sapply(objs, `[[`, "Key")
)

gpkg_files <- gpkg_files[grepl("\\.gpkg$", gpkg_files)]


indicator_tbl <- data.frame(
  file = gpkg_files,
  indicator_id = sub("^ind_(.*)\\.gpkg$", "\\1", basename(gpkg_files)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

indicator_tbl$vector <- lapply(indicator_tbl$file, vect)


```


## 0.2 Dummy Data

```{r}
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "eccc_reclass_reproj_algn_binary.tif"))
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "gpw_reproj_algn_natseminat_noshrub_masked.tif"))
dum_fut <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "AAFC_LUTS_2020_5-classes.tif"))

# plot(dum_base)
# plot(dum_fut)

roi3 <- vect(file.path(roi.dir, "modelling_study_area_aligned_cnvc_Jan2026.shp"))

# Reproject baseline 
dum_base <- if (file.exists("tmp_data/dum_base_projected.tif")) {
  rast("tmp_data/dum_base_projected.tif")
} else {
  writeRaster(project(dum_base, roi3), "tmp_data/dum_base_projected.tif", overwrite = TRUE)
}

```


# Calc indicators

```{r}
# ---- Progress logging setup ----

log_file <- here::here(
  "logs",
  paste0("indicator_progress_studyarea_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".log")
)

dir.create(dirname(log_file), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

log_msg <- function(msg) {
  timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", timestamp, msg),
      file = log_file,
      append = TRUE)
}

log_msg("Starting indicator calculation")
log_msg(paste("Number of vectors:", nrow(indicator_tbl)))
```


```{r}
# Enable parallel processing inside terra
terraOptions(cores = parallel::detectCores())

pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = nrow(indicator_tbl), style = 3)

results <- vector("list", nrow(indicator_tbl))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(indicator_tbl))) {
  id <- indicator_tbl$indicator_id[i]
  v  <- indicator_tbl$vector[[i]]


  log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %s: started", id))

  res <- tryCatch({
    
    v_one <- terra::union(v)
    
    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %s: dissolved to %d feature(s)",
      id, nrow(v_one)
    ))

    pix_sum <- extract(
      dum_base,
      v_one,
      fun = sum,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
    
    pix_val <- pix_sum[, 2, drop = TRUE]
   
    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %s: pixel count = %s",
      id, pix_val
    ))

    data.frame(
      indicator_id = id,
      pixel_ones   = pix_val,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

  }, error = function(e) {

    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %s: ERROR - %s",
      id, e$message
    ))

    NULL
  })

  results[[i]] <- res
  setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)

  log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %s: finished", id))
}

close(pb)

log_msg("Indicator calculation completed")

```

```{r}
indicators_studyarea_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(results)
```


```{r}
# Write local temp CSV
tmp_csv <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")

write.csv(
  indicators_studyarea_df,
  tmp_csv,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Upload to S3
aws.s3::put_object(
  file   = tmp_csv,
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  object = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/results/indicators_studyarea_pixel_counts2.csv"
)

log_msg("Saved indicators_studyarea_pixel_counts.csv to S3")
```
